lints.name: auth_rls_initplan
lints.title: Auth RLS Initialization Plan
lints.description: Detects if calls to \`current_setting()\` and \`auth.<function>()\` in RLS policies are being unnecessarily re-evaluated for each row
lints.detail: Table \`public.authorizations\` has a row level security policy \`Authorizations are viewable by admin and assigned therapist\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.

lints.name: auth_db_connections_absolute
lints.title: Auth DB Connection Strategy is not Percentage
lints.description: Using a percentage based allocation connection strategy for Auth can help to improve the server's performance when increasing instance size.
lints.detail: Your project's Auth server is configured to use at most 10 connections. Increasing the instance size without manually adjusting this number will not improve the performance of the Auth server. Switch to a percentage based connection allocation strategy instead.
